forgot-password-descreption: Worry not, we'll send you instructions to help you reset it.
descreption-reset-password: Set a strong password to secure your account.
password-must-be-at-least-8-characters-r: Password must be at least 8 characters
password-must-contain-at-least-one-upper: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
password-must-contain-at-least-one-lower: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
password-must-contain-at-least-one-numbe: Password must contain at least one number
password-must-contain-at-least-one-speci: Password must contain at least one special character
descreption-toast-forgetpassword: We found your email. A verification code has been sent.
descreption-error-toast-forgetpassword: We couldn't find an account associated with that email.
your-password-has-been-successfully-rese: Your password has been successfully reset.
something-went-wrong-while-resetting-you: Something went wrong while resetting your password. Please try again.
